notes: UK carbon accounting: CO2 from biomass counted as zero at point of combustion (UNFCCC rules)
CO2 released at chimney, ~330 kg/MWh for wood pellet plant at ~36% efficiency (comparable to coal)
Adds harvesting, chipping, drying, pelletising (~40 kg/MWh) and transport (~20 kg/MWh) to combustion
Net emissions if forest regrows and reabsorbs CO2 over 20 years; assumes managed plantation forestry
Net emissions over 40-year regrowth cycle; typical for SE US hardwood forests
Net emissions over 100-year regrowth; approaches carbon neutrality but far beyond 2050 target
DESNZ grid carbon factor for coal generation, includes combustion only
Adds mining, processing, and transport emissions (~80 kg/MWh)
DESNZ grid carbon factor for CCGT gas generation
Adds extraction, processing, pipeline/LNG transport, and methane leakage (~50 kg/MWh)
Full lifecycle including manufacture, installation, and decommissioning; no combustion emissions
Full lifecycle including panel manufacture (often in China), installation, and disposal
